jobCard.title: Process Videos
jobCard.description: Upload videos, choose an interpolation factor, and add them to the queue. All processing runs in your browser

upload.drag: or drag and drop video files
upload.formats: MP4, WebM, MOV, and most major formats

queueCard.title: Processing Queue
queueCard.description: Videos are processed one by one. Processed videos appear below
queueCard.limitationWarning: Some WebM and high-resolution videos above 1080p may fail to process

ffmpegLoadFailed.title: Video Engine Load Failed
ffmpegLoadFailed.description: Could not load the video engine. Refresh the page and try again

invalidFileType.title: Invalid File Type
invalidFileType.description: "{{fileName}}" was skipped because it is not a valid video file

noFilesSelected.title: No Videos Selected
noFilesSelected.description: Select one or more valid videos to process

errorReadingFile.title: Error Reading {{fileName}}
errorReadingFile.description: Could not read metadata from this video. It has been marked as invalid

errors.sharedArrayBufferError: Browser configuration error: SharedArrayBuffer requires HTTPS
